funFacts: The bright red and black spots of a Ladybugs Crawling in Garden Grass warn predators that they are toxic and unpleasant to eat.
Ladybugs Crawling in Garden Grasss act as natural pest controllers, eating up to 5,000 crop-destroying aphids during their lifetime.
